kategoriename.label: Kategoriename
kategoriename.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

farbe.label: Farbe
farbe.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

notiz.label: Notiz
notiz.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Notizen' with the id `69947a7338cc60e9b64f6817` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69947a7338cc60e9b64f6817/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

schlagwort.label: Schlagwort
schlagwort.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Schlagwörter' with the id `69947a72b56677beb9f4f1d5` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69947a72b56677beb9f4f1d5/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

prioritaet.label: Priorität
prioritaet.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

erstellungsdatum.label: Erstellungsdatum
erstellungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

erinnerung.label: Erinnerung
erinnerung.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.
